kukaKrl.validation.variableNameLength.description: Error when a variable name exceeds KUKA's 24-character limit (in DECL/STRUC/SIGNAL lines).

kukaKrl.validation.variableNameSyntax.description: Error when a variable name uses invalid KRL identifier syntax.

kukaKrl.validation.undeclaredIdentifiers.description: Information diagnostic for identifiers that are not declared in the current KRL workspace index.

kukaKrl.validation.globalUsage.description: Warning when GLOBAL is used without DECL/DEF/DEFFCT/STRUC/SIGNAL/ENUM (and not with a predefined type) on the same line.

kukaKrl.validation.defdatPublicGlobalReq.description: Warning when a DECL/SIGNAL/STRUC inside DEFDAT ... PUBLIC is missing the GLOBAL modifier.

kukaKrl.validation.defdatNonPublicGlobal.description: Error when a DECL/SIGNAL/STRUC inside a non-PUBLIC DEFDAT uses GLOBAL.
